theme: rose window lead-line and glass color design
title: Rosette: Lead-Line Partition and Glass Colour Design
strategies: trivial: R concentric full-ring faces, colours alternate 1,2 by ring parity (checker's own baseline)

greedy: k equal radial pie-wedges (full height), colours alternate 1,2 by wedge index -- the obvious rotationally-symmetric candy-stripe design; INFEASIBLE whenever k is odd (odd cycle needs 3 colours)

strong: co-designs geometry with the colouring obstruction -- always doubles the angular resolution to 2k arcs (so the quotient cycle length is always even, sidestepping the parity trap for ANY k), searches a small set of radial band counts and the best colour pair from the palette by harmony, and checkerboard-colours the result
